TextENGNew:
The gateway to Matsuribayashi opens when you find—
J1 A Fragment of Himatsubushi in the World of Beginnings
K1 A Fragment of Tsumihoroboshi in the World of Elucidation
K2 A Fragment of Meakashi in the World of Elucidation
K3 A Fragment of Minagoroshi in the World of Elucidation
...Once you've seen all of the above, L1 A Fragment of Matsuribayashi will appear in the World of Hope.
After selecting it, look at L2 Leftover Fragments, then look once more at L1 A Fragment of Matsuribayashi, and the way forward will open.
